\tzpentry{ID3595}{Gyromagnetic Potential Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3595 introduces Gyromagnetic Potential Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} U_{\text{constraint}} = \frac{K_{\text{bolt}}}{2}(d(t) - d_{\text{bolt}})^2 + V_{\text{bearing}}[\omega_{\text{gyro}}] \end{equation}
